report.summary: Built 2 learn pages covering Nasdaq SEC-approved tokenized equities trading pilot and Grayscale HYPE ETF (GHYP) filing — both major March 2026 institutional crypto milestones.

sections.title: Research Brief
items: SEC approved Nasdaq's tokenized equities trading pilot on March 18, 2026 — Russell 1000 stocks and major index ETFs can now settle on blockchain via DTC's LedgerScan system
NYSE also received approval (March 24), creating a competitive race for tokenized settlement infrastructure
T+0 settlement replaces traditional T+1/T+2, with first tokenized trades expected by end of Q3 2026
Grayscale filed S-1 for HYPE ETF (GHYP) on March 20, 2026 — the first DeFi-native protocol ETF filing
Hyperliquid dominates on-chain perpetuals with ~$6.2B TVL, 50%+ market share, $739B monthly volume, ~$899M annualized revenue
Bitwise and 21Shares also filed competing HYPE ETFs, signaling broad institutional DeFi interest
BlackRock's staked Ethereum ETF (ETHB) launched March 12 and SEC classified 16 cryptos as digital commodities on March 17 — both catalysts for these filings

sections.title: Content Created
items: Nasdaq Tokenized Equities Trading Guide 2026 (~3,100 words) — covers SEC approval, DTC pilot mechanics, T+0 settlement benefits, eligible securities (Russell 1000 + index ETFs), risks, comparison table of traditional vs tokenized settlement, timeline through 2027

Grayscale HYPE ETF Guide (~2,800 words) — covers GHYP filing details, Hyperliquid fundamentals, ETF structure (Coinbase custody, BNY Mellon transfer agent), competitive filings, DeFi institutional implications, risks, timeline

sections.title: SEO Optimization
items: Nasdaq page: title 'Nasdaq Tokenized Equities Trading Guide 2026: What the SEC Approval Means for Markets', target keyword 'Nasdaq tokenized equities', ArticleSchema + FAQSchema (6 FAQ items)
Grayscale page: title 'Grayscale HYPE ETF Guide: The First DeFi Protocol ETF Filing Explained', target keyword 'Grayscale HYPE ETF GHYP', ArticleSchema + FAQSchema (5 FAQ items)
Both pages include structured data (JSON-LD), breadcrumb navigation, internal linking to 4-6 related degen0x pages, proper OG metadata

sections.title: Publish Queue
items: Both pages added to PUBLISH_QUEUE in src/lib/published-pages.ts
Ready for promotion to PUBLISHED_PAGES in next publish cycle
